Restriction: Permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 10 credits if content differs. Cross-listed with ENTM609. Credit Only Granted for. ENTM609, NRSC609, or PLSC609.

Formerly: NRSC609.

PLSC618 Advances in Research; Critiquing Primary Plant Science Literature (1 Credit)

Discussion of advances in plant science research based on classic and current scientific literature.
